name: Peanut Butter Kiss Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Mix flour, baking soda, and salt in a bowl.
3. Soften the margarine and mix it with peanut butter until creamy.
4. Gradually add sugars, mixing until well blended.
5. Beat in the egg and vanilla extract.
6. Stir in the flour mixture until combined.
7. Roll the dough into one-inch balls.
8. Sprinkle sugar over each ball.
9. Place the cookies on ungreased baking sheets.
10. Bake for 12 minutes.
11. Press an unwrapped Hershey kiss onto the top of each warm cookie.
